overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player moves along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing neon-lit shops and digital billboards, transitioning through a covered corridor and emerging into a busy intersection with futuristic architecture and heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway beneath elevated highway with commercial storefronts

events.description: pedestrian wearing white outfit passes close to camera on the right
passing underneath the 'City Center' directional sign mounted on the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing commercial shops with neon signage

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing white athletic outfit and face mask
futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with weathered blue paint and support columns
multi-story brutalist concrete building with illuminated vertical windows
overhead directional sign with white text and arrows pointing to City Center
commercial food vendor with bright yellow and red neon lighting
large illuminated advertisement for El Coyote Cojo with vibrant graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban walkway beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city at night. The player walks forward past a concrete office building on the left and neon-lit food stalls on the right, passing underneath a 'City Center' directional sign while pedestrians and futuristic vehicles move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with stair access and digital advertising pillars

events.description: entering darker covered corridor section with concrete stairs visible on the right
lighting shifts to darker artificial tones as the corridor becomes more enclosed

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway, passing vending machines and ascending stairs on the right

notable_agents.action: figure walking ahead in the distance through the corridor

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to the elevated highway level
corporate advertisement sign for Biotechnica with green and white branding
illuminated vertical pillar displaying rotating digital advertisements
dark concrete ceiling of the covered walkway with embedded lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, enclosed pedestrian corridor beneath the highway. Concrete stairs ascend to the right while digital advertising pillars line the walkway. The environment becomes more industrial and shadowed, with the Biotechnica corporate sign visible on the right wall as the player moves deeper into the covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with futuristic curved architecture and heavy neon signage

events.description: emerging from covered corridor into open intersection with view of large curved glass building
futuristic vehicle passes by on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the street intersection, moving toward the brightly lit neon signage on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
figure standing near the crosswalk on the opposite side of the street

entered.detail: large cylindrical glass and steel building with illuminated windows and circular architecture
wide asphalt intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic flow
massive horizontal neon sign with bright pink Japanese text and graphics
curved underside of the elevated highway structure visible overhead with purple lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered corridor into a vast open intersection dominated by a massive curved glass building on the left. The scene is bathed in vibrant neon light from large pink Japanese signage ahead. Vehicles drive through the intersection as the player approaches the crosswalk, with the elevated highway now visible as a dramatic curved structure overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into a vast, neon-drenched city intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past a concrete office building and glowing food stalls under a City Center directional sign. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a darker, enclosed pedestrian corridor where industrial shadows deepen and digital advertising pillars line the path beside a Biotechnica corporate sign. The scene then opens abruptly as the player emerges from the passage into a wide intersection dominated by a massive curved glass building and vibrant pink Japanese signage. Finally, the perspective settles at a busy crosswalk, with the dramatic curve of the highway looming overhead against the brilliant lights of the city.
